cards.back: A function that assigns a real number to each outcome of a random experiment
A function that assigns a probability to each possible outcome of a random experiment
The long-run average of a random variable, calculated as the sum of each value multiplied by its probability
A measure of how spread out a probability distribution is, calculated as the square of the standard deviation
A measure of the amount of variation or dispersion of a probability distribution, calculated as the square root of the variance
